message:
feat(gateway): implement output streaming system

- Add OutputChunk types and output buffer service
- Hook agent spawn/terminate to start/stop output streaming
- Stream output events to WebSocket hub on agent:output channel
- Add cursor-based pagination for output retrieval
- Include comprehensive tests for output service

Implements flywheel_gateway-6ix (Output Streaming System)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -27,6 +27,9 @@ jobs:
       - name: Lint
         run: bun lint
 
+      - name: Parity check
+        run: bun parity-check
+
       - name: Unit tests
         run: bun test

@@ -18,6 +18,7 @@
     "lint:fix": "biome check --write .",
     "format": "biome format --write .",
     "typecheck": "tsc --noEmit",
+    "parity-check": "bun scripts/parity-check.ts",
     "db:generate": "bun db:generate",
     "db:migrate": "bun db:migrate",
     "db:studio": "bun db:studio"
